entries.source: Yes. Schools can use the public product first, then discuss custom AI learning spaces with school-specific workflows, confidentiality, and funded access options.
entries.value: Da. Šole lahko najprej uporabijo javni izdelek, nato pa se pogovorijo o prilagojenih učnih prostorih z UI, s šolskimi poteki dela, zaupnostjo in možnostmi financiranega dostopa.

entries.source: Yes. Subject hubs are public pages built for learners, Google, and AI answer engines. They expose only public learning guidance and public guest-mode URLs, not private saved chats.
entries.value: Da. Subjektivna središta su javne stranice izgradžene za učence, Google, in UI odgovorni motori. Izlažu samo javne upute za učenje in javni gost-način rada URLs, a ne privatne sačuvane čavrljalice.

entries.source: Yes. Teachers and school leaders can use the public prompt library to evaluate learning behaviors before discussing a tailored school deployment.
entries.value: Da. Učitelji in školski vodže mogu uporabljati javnu hitnu knjižnicu za procjenu učenja ponašanja preden nego kar raspravljaju o prilagodženom urniku šole.

entries.source: Yes. The guide library links into public guest modes such as Learn Anything, Socratic Instruction, Homework Coach, Math Step Coach, quizzes, flashcards, and historical conversations.
entries.value: Da. Vodič knjižnica ptezuje v načine javnog gosta kao kar su Učiti ništa, Sokratski instrukcije, Domači trener, Matematički korak trener, kvizi, kartice za ponavljanje, in povijesne razgovore.

entries.source: Yes. The historical person mode is a learning simulation for perspective and questioning. It should not be cited as an authenticated quotation.
entries.value: Da. Povijesni način osobe je simulacija učenja za perspektivu in ispitivanje. To se ne smije navesti kao autentifikovani citat.

entries.source: Yes. The linked public learning modes open in guest mode, so learners can try explanations, Socratic questions, homework coaching, quizzes, flashcards, and more without starting from a marketing page.
entries.value: Da. Ptezani načini javnog učenja otvoreni v načinu gostovanja, tako da učenci mogu probati objašnjenja, Sokratska vprašanja, domači trener, kvizi, flash kartice, in više bez počinjanja z marketinške stranice.

entries.source: Yes. The public guest learning modes are designed for free access, so learners can start without needing a school deployment or paid account.
entries.value: Da. Javni gostujoči učni načini so zasnovani za brezplačen dostop, zato lahko učenci začnejo brez šolske uvedbe ali plačljivega računa.

entries.source: Yes. The public guest modes and audience pages are designed so parents can inspect the learning behavior before relying on it.
entries.value: Da. Načini javnog gosta in publike su dizajnirani tako da starši mogu pregledati učenje ponašanje preden nego se oslanjaju na njega.

entries.source: Yes. The public guest modes let school leaders and teachers try the learning experience before discussing a tailored school deployment.
entries.value: Da. Načini javnog gosta dozvoljavaju školskim vodžama in učiteljima da probaju iskustvo učenja preden nego kar rasprave o prilagodženom urniku šole.

entries.source: Yes. The public Homework Coach is available at /chat/homework-coach, and this subject hub links to the supporting modes and guides.
entries.value: Da. Javni domači trener je dostupan na /chat/homework-coach, in ta subjekt čvor ptezuje na potporne načine in vodnike.

entries.source: Yes. The recommended use is hints, explanations, step checks, feedback, and review prompts rather than final answers you cannot explain.
entries.value: Da. Preporučena uporaba su savjeti, objašnjenja, provjera koraka, povratna informacija, in pregled potiče, a ne končni odgovori ki ne lahko razložiti.

entries.source: Yes. Use Time Travel for context, History Cause and Effect for argument structure, Debate for counterarguments, and Source Critic for evidence boundaries.
entries.value: Da. Koristite Vrijeme Putovanja za kontekst, Povijest Vzroki in Efekt za strukturu argumenta, Rasprava za kontraargumente, in Izvorni Kritički za granice dokaza.

entries.source: You are solely responsible for your conduct and any data, text, information, screen names, graphics, photos, profiles, audio and video clips, links ("Content") that you submit, post, and display on the inspir platform. Great Indian Company (Holding Partnership Firm, GST: 29AAWFG7015K1ZQ) uses the collected data for various purposes: To provide and maintain our Service To notify you about changes to our Service To allow you to participate in interactive features of our Service when you choose to do so to provide customer support To gather analysis or valuable information so that we can improve our Service To monitor the usage of our Service to detect, prevent and address technical issues To fulfil any other purpose for which you provide it To carry out our obligations and enforce our rights arising from any contracts entered into between you and us, including for billing and collection To provide you with notices about your account and/or subscription, including expiration and renewal notices, email-instructions, etc To provide you with news, special offers and general information about other goods, services and events which we offer that are similar to those that you have already purchased or enquired about unless you have opted not to receive such information In any other way we may describe when you provide the information For any other purpose with your consent
entries.value: Vi ste isključivo odgovorni za svoje ponašanje in sve podatke, tekst, informacije, imena zaslona, grafiku, fotografije, profile, audio in video klipte, linkte ("kontent") ki šaljete, objavite in prikazani na platformi inspir. Velika indijska podjetje (Držeči partnerstvo firma, GST: 29AAWFG7015K1ZQ) koristi prikupljene podatke za različite namene: Za pružanje in održavanje naše storitve Obavijestiti vas o spremembama naše storitve kako biste vam omogučili sudjelovati v interaktivnim značajkama naše storitve ko to odlučite učiniti kako biste pružili podporo klijentima kako bi prikupili analizo ali vrijedne informacije kako bismo mogli izboljšati uporaba naše storitve kako bi pratili uporaba naše storitve za odkrivanje, sprječavanje in rješavanje tehničkih vprašanja kako bi ispunili bilo koju drugu namen za koju je osigurate kako bi izvršili naše obveze in prteli naša prava ki proizlaze iz bilo kig ugovora ki ste sklopili izmedžu nas, uključujuči za naplatu in naplatu Kako biste dobili obavijest o vašem računu i/ili pretplati, uključujuči obvestila o isteku roka valjanosti in obnavljanju, e-mail-instrukcije, itd Za pružanje novosti, posebne ponude in opče informacije o drugim proizvodima, storitevma in dogadžanjima ki nudimo ki su slične onima o kima ste več kupili ali zatražili osim ako niste odlučili da takve informacije ne primite Na bilo ki drugi način lahko opisati ko pružate informacije V bilo koju drugu namen z svojim pristankom

entries.source: You can also start with a rough version of your real problem. A messy first prompt is fine. The session can clarify the level, audience, deadline, and style once you begin.
entries.value: Lahko takodžer začeti z grubom verzijom vašeg pravog problema. Neuredan prvi prompt je v redu. Sekcija lahko pojasniti razinu, publiku, rok, in stil nakon kar počnete.

entries.source: You can contact our Copyright Agent via email at support@inspir.app
entries.value: Lahko kontaktirati našeg agenta za avtorske pravice putem e-pošte na support@inspir.app

entries.source: You can try the format in Talk to a Historical Person. If you want the wider scene before meeting a person, use Time Travel to visit a period, inspect constraints, and then ask what choices people actually had.
entries.value: Lahko probati format v Talk to a History Osoba. Ako želite šire scene preden susreta z osobom, uporabljati Time Travel posjetiti razdoblje, pregledati ograničenja, a zatim pitati kar izbori ljudi zapravo imali.

entries.source: You know a Socratic AI tutor worked when the learner can do three things:
entries.value: Znaš da je sokratski UI tutor radio ko učenec lahko učiniti tri stvari:

entries.source: You may provide us either directly at support@inspir.app or via third party sites and tools with information and feedback concerning errors, suggestions for improvements, ideas, problems, complaints, and other matters related to our Service (“Feedback”). You acknowledge and agree that: (i) you shall not retain, acquire or assert any intellectual property right or other right, title or interest in or to the Feedback; (ii) Company may have development ideas similar to the Feedback; (iii) Feedback does not contain confidential information or proprietary information from you or any third party; and (iv) Company is not under any obligation of confidentiality with respect to the Feedback. In the event the transfer of the ownership to the Feedback is not possible due to applicable mandatory laws, you grant Company and its affiliates an exclusive, transferable, irrevocable, free-of-charge, sub-licensable, unlimited and perpetual right to use (including copy, modify, create derivative works, publish, distribute and commercialize) Feedback in any manner and for any purpose.
entries.value: Lahko nam pružiti izravno na support@inspir.app ali putem web-mjesta in alata trečih strana z informacijama in povratnim informacijama o napakama, predendlogima za poboljšanja, ideje, probleme, pritužbe in drugih stvari ptezanih z našom službom (“Povvojnek”). Potvrdžujete in se strinjate da: (i) ne smijete zadržati, steči ali tvrditi nikakvo pravo intelektualnog vlasništva ali drugo pravo, naslov ali interes za povratne informacije; (ii) Tvrtka lahko imati razvojne ideje slične Povratku; (iii) Povratni podatki ne sadrže povjerljive informacije ali vlasničke informacije od vas ali bilo ki tretje osebe; in (iv) Društvo nije pod nikakvom obvezom povjerljivosti v vezi z povratnim informacijama. V primeru da predennos vlasništva na povratne informacije nije moguč zbog važečih obveznih zakona, društvu in njegovim podružnicama date ekskluzivnu, prenosivu, neopozivnu, besplatnu, podlicencibilnu, neograničenu in trajno pravo na uporaba (uključujuči kopiranje, izmjenu, stvaranje izvedenih radova, objavljivanje, distribuciju in komercijalizaciju) Povratne informacije na bilo ki način in v bilo koju namen.

entries.source: You may submit a notification pursuant to the Digital Millennium Copyright Act (DMCA) by providing our Copyright Agent with the following information in writing (see 17 U.S.C 512(c)(3) for further detail):
entries.value: Lahko podnijeti obavijest v skladu z Zakonom o autorskim pravima digitalnog milenijuma (DMCA) putem pismenog pisanja naših agenata o autorskim pravima (vidjeti 17 SAD 512(c)(3) za daljnje detalje):

entries.source: You may use Service only for lawful purposes and in accordance with Terms. You agree not to use Service:
entries.value: Usluge lahko uporabljati samo za zakonite namene in v skladu z Pogojima. Pristajete da ne uporabljate uslugu:

entries.source: Your Data Protection Rights Under General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR)
entries.value: Vaša prava na zaštitu podatkov v skladu z Opčom uredbom o zaštiti podatkov (GDPR)

entries.source: Your Data Protection Rights under the California Consumer Privacy Act (CCPA)
entries.value: Vaša prava na zaštitu podatkov v skladu z Kalifornijskim Zakonom o zasebnosti potrošača (CCPA)

entries.source: Your Data Protection Rights under the California Privacy Protection Act (CalOPPA)
entries.value: Vaša prava na zaštitu podatkov po Kalifornijskom zakonu o zaštiti zasebnosti (CalOPPA)

entries.source: Your information, including Personal Data, may be transferred to – and maintained on – computers located outside of your state, province, country or other governmental jurisdiction where the data protection laws may differ from those of your jurisdiction. If you are located outside India and choose to provide information to us, please note that we transfer the data, including Personal Data, to India and process it there. Your consent to this Privacy Policy followed by your submission of such information represents your agreement to that transfer. Great Indian Company (Holding Partnership Firm, GST: 29AAWFG7015K1ZQ) will take all the steps reasonably necessary to ensure that your data is treated securely and in accordance with this Privacy Policy and no transfer of your Personal Data will take place to an organisation or a country unless there are adequate controls in place including the security of your data and other personal information.
entries.value: Vaši podatki, uključujuči osobne podatke, mogu se prenijeti na – in vzdrževati na – računala ki se nalaze izvan vaše države, pokrajine, države ali druge državne nadležnosti kjer se zakoni o zaštiti podatkov mogu razlikovati od onih v vašoj nadležnosti. Ako ste smješteni izvan Indije in odlučite nam pružiti informacije, molimo vas da prenijete podatke, uključujuči osobne podatke, v Indiju in obradite ih tamo. Vaš pristanak na to politiku zasebnosti nakon čega slijedi vaš podnošenje takvih podatkov predstavlja vaš dogovor na taj transfer. Velika indijanska podjetje (Držeči partnerstvo firma, GST: 29AAWFG7015K1ZQ) poduzima sve potrebne korake kako bi se osiguralo da se vaši podatki tretiraju sigurno in v skladu z tem Pravilom o zasebnosti te da se predennos osebnih podatkov neče obavljati v organizaciju ali državu osim ako postoje odgovarajuče kontrole uključujuči varnost vaših podatkov in drugih osebnih podatkov.
